title: CVE-2010-2372 — CVSS 4.3 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2010-2372

CVSS Score: 4.3 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2010-07-13T22:30:02.453
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the Oracle Transportation Management component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 6.1.1 allows remote attackers to affect integrity via unknown vectors, a different vulnerability than CVE-2010-2371.

References: http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuoct2010-175626.html, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuoct2010-175626.html
